assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Phase 1 includes comprehensive pre-flight checks with commands to verify current versions, cluster health, and node status

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Section 1.2 provides the exact gcloud command to check available versions in the Regular channel: 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone us-west1-b --format="yaml(channels)" | grep -A 20 "REGULAR"'

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Section 1.3 includes the command to check for deprecated APIs: 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated'

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Section 3.1 provides the exact command with --master flag: 'gcloud container clusters upgrade CLUSTER_NAME --zone us-west1-b --master --cluster-version 1.33'

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Sections 3.2 and 3.3 include verification steps with commands to check upgrade progress and verify control plane health, along with expected behavior descriptions

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Sections 4.1 and 4.4 provide exact gcloud commands for upgrading both node pools directly to 1.33, effectively using skip-level upgrade from 1.32 to 1.33

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Sections 4.2 and 4.5 include specific monitoring commands like 'watch kubectl get nodes' and commands to check for stuck pods during upgrades

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: The runbook shows control plane upgrade from 1.32 to 1.33, then node pools upgrade directly to 1.33, which is effectively skip-level for node pools

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Phase 5 includes comprehensive post-upgrade validation with commands to check node versions, pod health, kube-system pods, and overall cluster health

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: While the troubleshooting section covers common issues and fixes, it lacks a proper rollback section explaining how to rollback the cluster version if the upgrade fails
